case_title: DOUBLE CLICK LASER & COPY, DBA PRESS WORKS VS RAMIN, EFRIN IND & DBA S P C L SHIPPING AGENCY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIN, EFRIN IND & DBA S P C L SHIPPING AGENCY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,364.38 FILED BY DOUBLE CLICK LASER & COPY, DBA PRESS WORKS AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIN, EFRIN IND & DBA S P C L SHIPPING AGENCY DIZON, TONY A. IND & DBA S P C L SHIPPING AGENCY SPCL SHIPPING AGENCY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUBLE CLICK LASER & COPY, DBA PRESS WORKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPCL SHIPPING AGENCY, INC. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $765.00, THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE PROPER DEFT: SPCL SHIPPING AGENCY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE CLAIM IS DISMISSED AS TO DEFTS RAMIN AND DIZON POS WAIVED.
